# Your AI Group

> AI-powered automation for small and mid-size businesses.

Your AI Group deploys AI voice agents, chatbots, missed-call text-back, smart CRM websites, marketing automation, and workflow automation for service businesses. We handle the full stack — strategy, build, and ongoing optimization — so owners get results without learning new tools.

## Services

- AI Voice Agents (24/7 phone answering, appointment booking)
- AI Chat Agents (website and SMS conversational AI)
- Missed Call Text-Back (instant SMS when calls go unanswered)
- Smart Website + CRM (lead capture sites with built-in pipeline)
- Marketing Automation (email/SMS nurture sequences, review generation)
- Workflow Automation (invoicing, scheduling, reporting, integrations)

## Industry Pages

We serve 83 industries across 13 categories. Each page explains how AI automation applies to that specific business type.
